nextPageKey.description: Cursor for the next page of results.

totalCount.description: The total number of environments in the account.

environments.description: The list of environments on this page.

items.description: Represents a Dynatrace environment (tenant) associated with the account.

name.description: The display name of the environment.

status.description: The current status of the environment.

trial.description: Whether the environment is a trial environment.
